ignoreFiles.description: Glob patterns for files to ignore when assigning commits to packages (applied globally).

publish.description: Whether this package should be published.

changelog.description: Path to the changelog file. Defaults to <packageDir>/CHANGELOG.md.

name.description: Override the package name used in tags, changelogs, and commit messages.

from.description: Starting commit hash. Only commits after this are considered for the first release.

ignoreFiles.description: Glob patterns for files to ignore when assigning commits to this package.

extraDeps.description: Extra workspace package names to treat as dependencies for propagation and rollup.

branches.description: Branch-based release configuration. Maps branch names to release behavior.

tagFormat.description: Tag name format template. Supports `{version}` and `{name}` placeholders. Defaults: single package = `"v{version}"`, monorepo = `"{name}@{version}"`.

groups.description: Version groups for monorepo version alignment.

prLabels.description: Labels to add to Release PRs. Defaults to ["autorelease: pending"].

$schema.description: Path or URL to the JSON Schema for editor validation.

fixed.description: Fixed groups: all packages always share the same version.

linked.description: Linked groups: bumped packages share the highest version.
